title: Kangaroo Level 1-2 - Practice Set 15: Mixed Review
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: Lara has 3 red apples and 4 green apples. How many apples does she have in total?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='15' cy='30' r='8'/><circle cx='35' cy='30' r='8'/><circle cx='55' cy='30' r='8'/><circle cx='90' cy='30' r='8'/><circle cx='110' cy='30' r='8'/><circle cx='130' cy='30' r='8'/><circle cx='150' cy='30' r='8'/><text x='70' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='12'>+</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three apples plus four apples
questions.solution: 3 + 4 = 7 apples.

questions.question_text: Count the kites flying in the sky. How many are there?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><polygon points='20,10 30,25 20,55 10,25'/><polygon points='60,15 70,30 60,60 50,30'/><polygon points='100,10 110,25 100,55 90,25'/><polygon points='140,15 150,30 140,60 130,30'/><polygon points='180,10 190,25 180,55 170,25'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Five kite shapes in a row
questions.solution: Counting each kite: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5.

questions.question_text: Which of these shapes has exactly four equal sides?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 250 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='25' cy='30' r='18'/><rect x='60' y='12' width='36' height='36'/><polygon points='130,12 148,48 112,48'/><rect x='165' y='18' width='50' height='24'/><polygon points='235,12 250,30 235,48 220,30'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Circle, square, triangle, rectangle, diamond
questions.solution: A square has four sides that are all equal in length.

questions.question_text: Look at the pattern: sun, moon, sun, moon, sun, ___. What comes next?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 50' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='20' cy='25' r='10'/><path d='M55 15 A10 10 0 1 0 55 35 A8 8 0 1 1 55 15'/><circle cx='100' cy='25' r='10'/><path d='M135 15 A10 10 0 1 0 135 35 A8 8 0 1 1 135 15'/><circle cx='180' cy='25' r='10'/><rect x='210' y='15' width='20' height='20' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Alternating sun and moon pattern with a blank
questions.solution: The pattern alternates sun then moon, so after sun comes moon.

questions.question_text: Four pencils have different lengths. Which label marks the longest pencil?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 100' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><line x1='10' y1='20' x2='60' y2='20'/><text x='65' y='24' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>A</text><line x1='10' y1='40' x2='120' y2='40'/><text x='125' y='44' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>B</text><line x1='10' y1='60' x2='180' y2='60'/><text x='185' y='64' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>C</text><line x1='10' y1='80' x2='90' y2='80'/><text x='95' y='84' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>D</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Four horizontal pencil lines labeled A, B, C, D of different lengths
questions.solution: Pencil C stretches the farthest across the row.

questions.question_text: The clock shows the time when Sam eats breakfast. What time is it?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='40'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='50' y2='20'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='75' y2='50'/><text x='46' y='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>12</text><text x='84' y='54' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>3</text><text x='46' y='90' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>6</text><text x='10' y='54' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>9</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Analog clock with hour hand on 12 and minute hand on 3
questions.solution: Hour hand on 12, minute hand on 3 means 12:15.

questions.question_text: Tim had 9 marbles. He gave 2 to his sister. How many marbles does Tim have left?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 50' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='15' cy='25' r='7'/><circle cx='35' cy='25' r='7'/><circle cx='55' cy='25' r='7'/><circle cx='75' cy='25' r='7'/><circle cx='95' cy='25' r='7'/><circle cx='115' cy='25' r='7'/><circle cx='135' cy='25' r='7'/><circle cx='155' cy='25' r='7' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><circle cx='175' cy='25' r='7' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Nine marbles with two shown as dashed (given away)
questions.solution: 9 - 2 = 7 marbles left.

questions.question_text: Three children stand in a row. Mia is between Ben and Zoe. Ben is on the left. Who stands on the right?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 70' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='40' cy='30' r='15'/><rect x='30' y='45' width='20' height='20'/><circle cx='120' cy='30' r='15'/><rect x='110' y='45' width='20' height='20'/><circle cx='200' cy='30' r='15'/><rect x='190' y='45' width='20' height='20'/><text x='30' y='14' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>Ben</text><text x='110' y='14' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>Mia</text><text x='195' y='14' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three stick figures labeled Ben, Mia, and a question mark
questions.solution: Ben is on the left and Mia is in the middle, so Zoe must be on the right.

questions.question_text: A toy car costs 6 coins. Anna pays with a 10-coin bill. How many coins should she get back?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='15' width='60' height='30'/><text x='25' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>10</text><circle cx='120' cy='30' r='12'/><text x='114' y='34' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>6</text><text x='150' y='34' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>=?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A bill worth 10 and a coin worth 6
questions.solution: 10 - 6 = 4 coins in change.

questions.question_text: In the grid, some squares are shaded. How many squares are shaded?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 120 120' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='currentColor'/><rect x='40' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='70' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='currentColor'/><rect x='10' y='40' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='30' height='30' fill='currentColor'/><rect x='70' y='40' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='10' y='70' width='30' height='30' fill='currentColor'/><rect x='40' y='70' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='70' y='70' width='30' height='30' fill='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: 3x3 grid with 5 shaded squares in a checker pattern
questions.solution: Counting the filled squares gives 5.

questions.question_text: The numbers go 2, 4, 6, 8, ___. What is the missing number?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 40' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='5' y='5' width='30' height='30'/><text x='15' y='26' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>2</text><rect x='45' y='5' width='30' height='30'/><text x='55' y='26' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>4</text><rect x='85' y='5' width='30' height='30'/><text x='95' y='26' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>6</text><rect x='125' y='5' width='30' height='30'/><text x='135' y='26' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>8</text><rect x='165' y='5' width='30' height='30' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><text x='177' y='26' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Sequence 2, 4, 6, 8 with a blank box
questions.solution: The pattern adds 2 each step, so 8 + 2 = 10.

questions.question_text: A shape has one curved edge and one flat edge. Which shape is it?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='25' cy='30' r='18'/><path d='M60 48 A18 18 0 0 1 96 48 Z'/><rect x='115' y='12' width='36' height='36'/><polygon points='170,12 188,48 152,48'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Circle, half-circle, square, triangle
questions.solution: A half-circle has one curved edge and one flat edge.

questions.question_text: On a bus there are 5 cats and 3 dogs. Two cats get off at the stop. How many animals remain on the bus?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='20' width='200' height='50' rx='5'/><circle cx='30' cy='50' r='8'/><circle cx='30' cy='70' r='5'/><circle cx='180' cy='70' r='5'/><text x='100' y='50' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='12'>5 cats, 3 dogs</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A bus with animals inside
questions.solution: Start with 5 + 3 = 8 animals. After 2 cats leave: 8 - 2 = 6.

questions.question_text: Four bowls hold different numbers of berries: 7, 4, 9, and 5. Which bowl has the most berries?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><path d='M10 40 Q30 70 50 40'/><text x='25' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='12'>7</text><path d='M70 40 Q90 70 110 40'/><text x='85' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='12'>4</text><path d='M130 40 Q150 70 170 40'/><text x='145' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='12'>9</text><path d='M190 40 Q210 70 230 40'/><text x='205' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='12'>5</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Four bowls labeled with 7, 4, 9, 5
questions.solution: 9 is the largest of 7, 4, 9, 5.

questions.question_text: There are 12 cookies on a plate. Four friends share them equally. How many cookies does each friend get?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='100' cy='40' r='35'/><circle cx='85' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='115' cy='30' r='4'/><circle cx='85' cy='50' r='4'/><circle cx='115' cy='50' r='4'/><circle cx='100' cy='40' r='4'/><circle cx='75' cy='40' r='4'/><circle cx='125' cy='40' r='4'/><circle cx='100' cy='25' r='4'/><circle cx='100' cy='55' r='4'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A plate with 12 cookies (illustrated as small circles)
questions.solution: 12 divided by 4 equals 3 cookies each.

questions.question_text: A movie starts at 4 o'clock and lasts 2 hours. At what time does it finish?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 100' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='40'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='75' y2='50'/><line x1='50' y1='50' x2='50' y2='20'/><text x='46' y='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>12</text><text x='85' y='54' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='8'>3</text><text x='100' y='54' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>+2h</text><circle cx='170' cy='50' r='40' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><text x='165' y='54' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Clock showing 4:00 and blank clock with plus 2 hours
questions.solution: 4 + 2 = 6, so the movie finishes at 6 o'clock.

questions.question_text: Five friends pick cards numbered 1 to 5. Leo's number is one more than Ava's. Ava's number is 3. What is Leo's number?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='10' width='30' height='40'/><text x='20' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>1</text><rect x='50' y='10' width='30' height='40'/><text x='60' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>2</text><rect x='90' y='10' width='30' height='40'/><text x='100' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>3</text><rect x='130' y='10' width='30' height='40'/><text x='140' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>4</text><rect x='170' y='10' width='30' height='40'/><text x='180' y='35' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>5</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Five cards numbered 1 through 5
questions.solution: Ava has 3, so Leo has 3 + 1 = 4.

questions.question_text: Nina folded a piece of paper and cut one triangle from the fold. When unfolded, how many triangle holes appear?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='10' width='60' height='60'/><polygon points='60,30 70,40 60,50'/><line x1='70' y1='10' x2='70' y2='70' stroke-dasharray='3,3'/><text x='90' y='45' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>unfold</text><rect x='150' y='10' width='60' height='60'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A folded paper with one triangle cut, before unfolding
questions.solution: One cut through a fold creates a mirrored hole, so there are 2 triangle holes when unfolded.

questions.question_text: A box holds 20 crayons. Pia uses 6 and Tom uses 7. How many crayons are left in the box?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='20' width='180' height='40'/><text x='60' y='46' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='16'>20 crayons</text></svg>
questions.image_description: A box labeled 20 crayons

questions.question_text: Beads are strung in this order: red, red, blue, red, red, blue. If this pattern continues, what color is the 10th bead?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 260 40' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><circle cx='15' cy='20' r='8'/><circle cx='40' cy='20' r='8'/><circle cx='65' cy='20' r='8' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='90' cy='20' r='8'/><circle cx='115' cy='20' r='8'/><circle cx='140' cy='20' r='8' fill='currentColor'/><circle cx='165' cy='20' r='8' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><circle cx='190' cy='20' r='8' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><circle cx='215' cy='20' r='8' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><circle cx='240' cy='20' r='8' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Bead pattern with 6 beads visible and 4 blank beads continuing
questions.solution: The pattern repeats every 3 beads: positions 3, 6, 9 are blue. Position 10 is red (the first of a new cycle).

questions.question_text: A ladybug climbs up 5 steps, then slides down 2, then climbs up 4 more. How many steps above the start is she now?
questions.image_description: A ladder with several rungs
questions.solution: 5 - 2 + 4 = 7 steps above the start.

questions.question_text: A pen costs 3 coins and an eraser costs 2 coins. Kira buys 2 pens and 1 eraser. How many coins does she pay?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 70' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><line x1='10' y1='30' x2='60' y2='30' stroke-width='3'/><text x='20' y='55' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>pen=3</text><rect x='90' y='20' width='30' height='20'/><text x='90' y='55' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='10'>eraser=2</text><text x='150' y='38' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>2 pens + 1</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Pen and eraser with prices and shopping list
questions.solution: 2 pens cost 2 x 3 = 6 coins. Plus 1 eraser at 2 coins = 8 coins total.

questions.question_text: Look at the tree. How many apples hang on it?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 160 160' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='70' y='100' width='20' height='50'/><circle cx='80' cy='70' r='50'/><circle cx='60' cy='55' r='5'/><circle cx='95' cy='50' r='5'/><circle cx='75' cy='75' r='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='80' r='5'/><circle cx='55' cy='85' r='5'/><circle cx='85' cy='95' r='5'/></svg>
questions.image_description: A tree with six apples among the leaves
questions.solution: Counting apples one by one gives 6.

questions.question_text: Three boxes contain 4, 7, and 5 toy bricks. The bricks are combined and shared equally into two new piles. How many bricks are in each pile?
questions.image_svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 80' stroke='currentColor' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='20' width='50' height='50'/><text x='28' y='50' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>4</text><rect x='80' y='20' width='50' height='50'/><text x='98' y='50' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>7</text><rect x='150' y='20' width='50' height='50'/><text x='168' y='50' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>5</text><text x='210' y='50' stroke='none' fill='currentColor' font-size='14'>=?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three boxes labeled 4, 7, and 5
questions.solution: 4 + 7 + 5 = 16 bricks in total. Shared into 2 piles: 16 / 2 = 8 each.
